channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Grassroots Grazing Revolution Revives Rangelands in Insiza @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Farmers in Insiza District are reporting healthier grazing lands and improved livestock management after adopting a paddocking system under the Holistic Land and Livestock Management (HLLM) programme. The approach which involves dividing grazing areas into separate paddocks and rotating cattle according to [...] The post Grassroots Grazing Revolution Revives Rangelands in Insiza appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe steps up repatriation of citizens amid SA unrest @bulawayo24
item.description: The Zimbabwean Government has intensified efforts to assist citizens displaced by a renewed wave of anti-migrant protests and vigilante attacks in South Africa, as concerns grow over the safety and we... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Khama blasts Mnangagwa over CAB3 @bulawayo24
item.description: Former Botswana president Ian Khama has launched a scathing attack on President Emmerson Mnangagwa and Zimbabwe’s proposed Constitution Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), accusing the Zimbabwean leader of a... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Cop sues cop over ’malicious’ arrest @bulawayo24
item.description: A Masvingo police officer has taken the unusual step of suing six fellow officers for US$50,000, alleging malicious arrest and prosecution after he was accused of illegally possessing copper wire and... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Macheso in road accident @bulawayo24
item.description: Sungura music legend Alick Macheso escaped unhurt after being involved in a road accident in the early hours of the morning following a performance at Legends Bar in Juru-Bhora Growth Point, along the... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chiwenga, Mnangagwa pact dead @bulawayo24 @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: The passage of the controversial Constitution Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3) through the National Assembly has intensified succession tensions within Zanu-PF, with analysts warning that the legislation c... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Chiefs accuse police of protecting child marriage offenders @bulawayo24
item.description: Traditional leaders in Mashonaland West have accused some police officers of undermining efforts to combat child marriage by allegedly shielding perpetrators of statutory rape and child abuse through... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Ex-Army captain loses US$204,800 damages claim @bulawayo24
item.description: The High Court in Bulawayo has dismissed a US$204,800 damages claim filed by former Zimbabwe National Army (ZNA) captain Solomon Ndlovu, who alleged that he suffered financial losses, reputational dam... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Matemadanda died of suspected food poisoning at war veterans event @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Ambassador to Mozambique and the Kingdom of Eswatini, Victor Matemadanda, has died, bringing to a close a long and influential career in Zimbabwe’s liberation struggle, politics and public... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: How Kenya’s $2.9 billion airport upgrade drew an Indian billionaire and a Zimbabwean businessman Chivayo into a political storm @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Business Insider Africa Kenya’s plan to modernize its main international airport has evolved into one of the country’s most controversial infrastructure projects, drawing in Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, controversial Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo, Chinese contractors, labor unions, courts and senior government officials. Kenya’s plan to expand Nairobi’s Jomo Kenyatta International Airport has become a highly [...] The post How Kenya’s $2.9 billion airport upgrade drew an Indian billionaire and a Zimbabwean businessman Chivayo into a political storm appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Efforts to repatriate SA returnees intensify @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Efforts to repatriate SA returnees intensify – herald Records of Zimbabweans voluntarily leaving South Africa, through Stated assistance, are processed by the local Civil Protection Committee at the Reception and Support Centre in Beitbridge. — Picture: Thupeyo Muleya. Ivan Zhakata-Herald Correspondent GOVERNMENT has intensified efforts to facilitate the safe return of Zimbabweans assembled at [...] The post Efforts to repatriate SA returnees intensify appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ‘The Beast’ personifies Zimbabwe’s quality rugby exports to the Springboks over the years
item.description: IOL The Zimbabwe visit to Gqeberha on Saturday was a reminder of the players from that part of the world who have graced the Springboks. Superb players such as Ray Mordt, Gary Teichmann, Bob Skinstad, and Tonderai Chavhanga. They all have a story, but the one I love is that of Tendai “The Beast” Mtawarira, a [...] The post ‘The Beast’ personifies Zimbabwe’s quality rugby exports to the Springboks over the years appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation
item.description: LONDON — Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation, the All England Club announced Sunday. The move comes after the 44-year-old Williams recently returned to competition in doubles after nearly four years away from professional tennis. And it means that Williams will play both singles and doubles at Wimbledon [...] The post Serena Williams will play singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Argentina may have America to thank for Lionel Messi’s latest World Cup heroics
item.description: ATLANTA — Lionel Messi’s move to America will look like a masterstroke if he leads Argentina to back-to-back World Cup titles. His decision to join Inter Miami in 2023 has already been good for all parties, raising the profile of soccer in the United States, delivering titles for his club and writing a new chapter [...] The post Argentina may have America to thank for Lionel Messi’s latest World Cup heroics appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: From Bulawayo to Netflix: How Sue Nyathi turned a Zimbabwean story into a global phenomenon @nehandaradio
item.description: What began as a self-published novel by a Zimbabwean investment analyst writing late into the night has become one of Netflix’s biggest African success stories, introducing Sue Nyathi’s work to millions worldwide. The post From Bulawayo to Netflix: How Sue Nyathi turned a Zimbabwean story into a global phenomenon appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
